title: Incubation Periods
body_html:
DiseaseIncubation Period
Influenza1 to 4 days
Scarlet fever1 to 4 days
Parainfluenza2 to 6 days
Tetanus4 to 21 days
Chickenpox10 to 21 days
Mumps14 to 18 days
Measles10 to 18 days
Rubella12 to 23 days
Glandular fever4 to 6 weeks
Hepatitis A4 to 7 weeks

Source: CDC

The RCEM syllabus highlights the need to be familiar with incubation periods for measles, mumps, rubella, chickenpox, Influenza and parainfluenza. They may also ask you about other diseases where they specify familiarity with the clinical course of the disease.
